summary: Outstanding audience recording that rivals soundboard quality
review: The reviewer praises this audience capture as exceptionally clear, claiming it could make any SBD (soundboard) CD gather dust. No specific musical moments or set details are mentioned, so the highlight of this release is its surprisingly high‑fidelity tape‑deck capture.

ai_rating.rationale: 5‑star review focuses on the audio quality being excellent; with no musical commentary, rating reflects strong recording but unknown show performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape is described as very nice and clear, comparable to a soundboard source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on the performance or set structure were provided.
